title: Debug Services — Is kube-proxy proxying?
text:
Assuming you do see one the above cases, try again to access your Service by
IP from one of your Nodes:
curl 10.0.1.175:80
hostnames-632524106-bbpiw
If this still fails, look at the
kube-proxy
logs for specific lines like:
Setting endpoints for default/hostnames:default to [10.244.0.5:9376 10.244.0.6:9376 10.244.0.7:9376]
If you don't see those, try restarting
kube-proxy
with the
-v
flag set to 4, and
then look at the logs again.
